name: LNK iššukis.Naujas hitas
overview: LNK Challenge will search for a song that will become a new Lithuanian hit. In the challenge, you will see behind the scenes of the work of the most famous music producers, and hits will be created by talented people striving to enter the music sky!

trailers.title: LNK iššūkis NAUJAS HITAS. Nuo rugsėjo 6 d.
